title: thelypteris serra
intro: Thelypteris serra, also known as the serrated fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The roots and rhizomes of Thelypteris serra are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
